overview.description: AI-powered poker training platform with GTO solver, hand trainer, and hand history analyzer
overview.description_long: GTO Wizard (operated by amagama s.r.o.) is the #1 poker study and training platform, combining an AI-powered GTO solver, interactive practice trainer, hand history analyzer, and live coaching content. The platform covers all formats (cash, MTT, SNGs, Spin & Go) and also provides AI-driven integrity services to poker networks for cheating detection. Available on web, iOS, and Windows. Fully remote company with a global team and a physical lounge in Japan.

history.origin_story: Founded in 2020 out of frustration with unintuitive and inaccessible poker study tools. Became the #1 used poker study tool within its first year. Legal entity (amagama s.r.o.) was registered in Prague in 2013.

key_milestones.event: GTO Wizard founded; became #1 poker study tool within the first year
Partnership with World Series of Poker (WSOP) — brand featured on WSOP tables
Launched GTO Wizard AI (customizable real-time AI solutions); partnered with major poker networks for integrity/cheating detection
Opened GTO Wizard Lounge in Japan, a premium physical hub for players

notable_people.name: Radek Kratochvil
notable_people.role: Art Director / AI enthusiast / Brand Conductor / Design leader

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: GTO Wizard's core AI is a specialized game-theory solver (not a generic LLM wrapper), and its value lies in the ecosystem of solutions, trainer, hand analyzer, and coaching content. However, if general AI systems can solve poker in real-time at lower cost, the solver moat weakens. The community, UX, and content library provide some lock-in.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Poker training is a proven, recurring-spend niche. GTO Wizard has demonstrated clear PMF by becoming the #1 study tool within its first year, and has B2B integrity revenue from poker networks as a diversifying stream.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known external funding rounds; appears to be bootstrapped or self-funded. Has subscription revenue (freemium model with paid tiers starting at $39/mo) suggesting real revenue, but limited runway data for a 51-200 person fully remote team.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Strong PMF and real revenue in a niche market, but medium AGI displacement risk and uncertain funding position (no disclosed rounds). The integrity services B2B line and global brand partnerships (WSOP) add resilience.

metadata.notes: GTO Wizard is operated by amagama s.r.o. (ICO: 01598341, Prague 1, registered 2013-04-17). No public founder or CEO names found. Recruitee job board shows 0 open positions, but website careers page lists 2 roles (ML Researcher, Paid Campaigns Manager) — may be outdated. Fully remote company with physical presence in Japan (GTO Wizard Lounge, 2024).
